column1: George Noel Gordon,______Lord Byron, was a poet.
Edgar Allan Poe,_________famous poet and writer of mystery stories, lost his parents when he was a little boy.
_________composer Franz Peter Schubert did not live to be very old, but he wrote over 600 musical works in his brief lifetime of 31 years.
William Pitt became______prime minister when he was only 24.
Tony Blair,_________Labour leader, won the general election victory in 1997, ending 18 years of Conservative government in Britain.
Jane Evans,_________girl who won the race, is my schoolmate.
